sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 71:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 71:1
items.html: Because AB never connected with the bottom Hey. Hence, when Mochin of AB are imparted to SAG, they lower the bottom Hey from the Einayim of SAG to the Peh, as the bottom Hey is not found in the Einayim of AB. (Inner Observation, Item 17)
